changes.value:
swissarmyhammer-config/src/model.rs:1781-1864

Uncovered lines: 1794, 1800, 1810-1812, 1819, 1821, 1825-1828, 1834-1836, 1844, 1858-1860

```rust
pub fn use_agent(agent_name: &str, paths: &ModelPaths) -> Result<(), ModelError>
fn validate_agent_name_security(agent_name: &str) -> Result<(), ModelError>
```

use_agent sets the active agent in config. validate_agent_name_security checks for empty names, length overflow, null bytes, path traversal, and control characters. Test each validation branch: empty name, overly long name, name with null bytes, name with '../', name with control chars, and a valid name that writes config.
Add tests for ModelManager::use_agent and validate_agent_name_security
